creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
(In reply to Marcus von Appen from comment #3)
> > To me, or to all committers?
> 
> To non-committers.

Sic transit gloria mundi... I am a committer, Marcus. A mere ports-committer, but a committer nonetheless -- mi@... Had I NOT been one, how could I have been "able to affect any sort of changes using edit-pr"?

Please, do the needful. Thank you!
